trigger.title: Simulate Climate Disaster
trigger.description: Simulates an extreme climate event detected by the oracle.

modal.title: ALERT: Climate Disaster
modal.warning1: The climate oracle has detected severe frost conditions.
modal.warning2: The escrow contract will be frozen immediately.
modal.warning3: Pending phases will be permanently locked.
modal.warning4: The Parametric Rescue Fund will be activated to protect the farmer.

frozen.bannerDescription: Climate disaster detected — Pending funds have been locked by the oracle.
